task_completion.description: Corrected DUBOIS's clinical gap by prescribing medication for Hypertension and Type 2 Diabetes, and documented reasoning.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing DUBOIS's patient record in MedinTux with a new prescription for hypertension and/or diabetes medication, along with a new consultation note explaining the addition.

task_completion.description: Corrected LAMBERT's medication issue by replacing aspirin with an appropriate anticoagulant for Atrial Fibrillation, and documented reasoning.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing LAMBERT's patient record in MedinTux with a new or modified prescription for an anticoagulant (e.g., apixaban, rivaroxaban, dabigatran, or warfarin) instead of aspirin, along with a consultation note explaining the change.

task_completion.description: Corrected PERRIN's overdue follow-up by scheduling an appointment for COPD review, and documented reasoning.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing PERRIN's patient record in MedinTux with a newly scheduled appointment or a consultation note explicitly stating that a follow-up appointment has been scheduled/requested for COPD.

task_completion.description: Corrected NICOLAS's medication safety issue by stopping the combined oral contraceptive (ethinylestradiol) due to migraine with aura, and documented reasoning.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing NICOLAS's patient record in MedinTux with the combined oral contraceptive prescription stopped, removed, or changed to a safe alternative, along with a consultation note explaining the contraindication.

integrity.description: The agent used the MedinTux graphical user interface to perform the audit and make corrections.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the MedinTux application windows (e.g., Manager, DrTux) being actively used, rather than terminal windows executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Consultation notes were entered manually into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the text editor or consultation note section within MedinTux containing the agent's typed reasoning.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to manipulate the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL/MariaDB prompts or scripts being run to insert rubrics (TypeRub 20020100, 20030000) directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves four specific patients with planted clinical issues that must be corrected and documented in a consultation note: 1) DUBOIS: Has Hypertension and Type 2 Diabetes but no active prescription (needs medication). 2) LAMBERT: Has Atrial Fibrillation but is only prescribed aspirin (needs an anticoagulant per guidelines). 3) PERRIN: Has COPD and is >9 months overdue for a follow-up (needs an appointment scheduled). 4) NICOLAS: Has Migraine with aura and is prescribed a combined oral contraceptive containing ethinylestradiol (absolute contraindication, needs to be stopped). Patient dates of birth in the records may differ from the task description, but this does not affect the required clinical actions.
